---
title: "writer.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/writer.ts"
loc: 43
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.15
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 4.79
overall_score: 5.57
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FileData](file://../analyzer.js)
- [defaultProvider](file://./llm.js)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `writeReport`
- `writeReport`
- `statsDir`
- `intent`
- `absoluteRoot`
- `absoluteFile`
- `relativePath`
- `flattenedName`
- `qmdPath`
- `m`
- `content`
